description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe featuring a vibrant color scheme with a teal green upper, accented by a bold red swoosh-like design on the side. The shoe has a robust, chunky gray sole with pronounced tread details, suggesting durability and comfort for urban environments. The upper material appears to be a combination of synthetic leather and mesh, providing both structure and breathability. The lacing system is standard criss-cross with matching green laces, and the tongue and collar are well-padded for ankle support. The back of the shoe features a horizontal red stripe with a star-shaped gray patch at the heel. The overall design is modern and sporty, suitable for streetwear or casual athletic use.
description: A modern high-top athletic shoe in teal green with a red side accent, chunky gray sole, and standard criss-cross lacing. The design is sporty, durable, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the teal green upper, red swoosh accent, and thick gray sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the green laces, perforated toe box, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, showing the red accent and sole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the red horizontal stripe, star-shaped gray patch, and padded collar.
